title: HOMEOWNERSHIP - 211info
text: HABITAT FOR HUMANITY OF THE MID-WILLAMETTE VALLEY HOMEOWNERSHIP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an opportunity for families to build and buy their own homes. The houses are built with volunteer labor and donated materials and are then sold at no profit to homeowner families. Agency does not provide immediate or emergency housing. This is a long-term housing program. 1220 12th Street SE Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: Households that meet all of the following requirements: -Are United States citizens or permanent residents -Must live in affiliate service area for at least 12 months -Have not owned a home in the past 3 years -Have not had a bankruptcy discharged within the past 3 years -Are currently living in substandard, subsidized housing, overcrowded or unaffordable housing -Can commit to 500 hours of sweat equity in construction -Must have steady income sufficient to repay an affordable mortgage and satisfactory credit history -Household within 50% to 80% of the Marion County median household income Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-4pm, Friday by appointment. Closed public holidays. Email (503) 364-6642 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 364-6642 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None to apply. Homebuyers pay low interest affordable mortgage and make monthly mortgage payments. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Cities of Aumsville, Detroit, Gates, Keizer, Lyons, Mill City, Salem, Stayton, and Sublimity and Polk County Services: Home Purchase/Construction Financing/Refinancing Subsidized Home Acquisition Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME REPAIR If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HABITAT FOR HUMANITY OF THE MID-WILLAMETTE VALLEY
